title: satureja fasciculata
intro: Satureja fasciculata, also known as Oregon mountain savory, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of western North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and antibacterial qualities, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Satureja fasciculata include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, making it a popular herbal remedy. Satureja fasciculata can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
